reach_why: Extends known critiques of LLM conservatism and institutional failure, but does not open wholly new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links model search biases, idea laundering, and institutional macho-aesthetic failure into one pathology.
falsifiable_why: Testable via ablations, anomaly-detection tasks, disruptive-insight benchmarks, and counterexamples where such systems surface genuine novelty.
explanation: Why polished language systems may stabilize failing institutions by filtering disruptive truths into acceptable continuity.
